title: Auction of Government of India Dated Securities
description: Government of India (GoI) has announced the sale (issue / re-issue) of four dated securities for a notified amount of ₹32,000 crore as per the following details: Sr No Security Date of Repayment Notified Amount (₹ Crore) GoI specific Notification Auction Date Settlement Date 1 6.03% GS 2029 Jan 27, 2029 11,000 F.No.4(1)-B(W&M)/2026 dated April 20, 2026 April 24, 2026 (Friday) April 27, 2026 (Monday) 2 6.68% GS 2033 Jan 27, 2033 11,000 3 7.24% GS 2055 Aug 18, 2055 5,000 4 New GOI
